nodes.name: Zosterops
nodes.summary: Zosterops（Zosterops）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联103种鸟类，如Sri Lanka white-eye、Black-capped white-eye、Ashy-bellied white-eye等103种鸟类。

nodes.name: Tagula white-eye
nodes.summary: Tagula white-eye（Zosterops meeki）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Tagula white-eye。

nodes.name: 动物界

nodes.name: NT

nodes.name: 脊索动物门

nodes.name: Tagula white-eye
nodes.summary: The Tagula white-eye or white-throated white-eye (Zosterops meeki) is a species of bird in the family Zosteropidae. It is endemic to Papua New Guinea. References
